title: ジャパンカップにむけて

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
The arena is roaring with life on the day of the
Japan Cup. The seats are filled with celebrating
spectators, not a vacancy to be seen.

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
I make my descent! Behold—this is beauty,
perfected! Be amazed at my power!

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
The soon-to-be Centurial Overlord faces off with
her eternal nemesis, the Dark Tempest Lord...
Doto.

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
My path has led me to the Japan Cup, where my
pride as ruler is on the line. And now, it begins!
